title: Find A Tote By Entering A Location Number On the Container Selection Screen
summary: Use the Container Selection screen to find a tote by entering a location number, then identify and select the associated rack or AGV when the tote is present in the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when you need to look up a tote by location number from the Container Selection screen and determine the rack or AGV associated with that location, if the tote is in the system.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for recovery actions when the tote is not in the system; this source does not provide recovery steps.
Do not use this runbook for alternate lookup methods not explicitly supported here beyond entering a location number and selecting the associated rack or AGV.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open or view the Container Selection screen, enter the location number, review the returned association, and select the shown rack or AGV.

safety_notes: Use only the documented lookup and selection actions supported by this source.
This source does not provide further action if no rack or AGV association is returned.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Container Selection screen
Ability to select the displayed rack or AGV result

access_required: Access to the Container Selection screen
system_preconditions: The tote must be in the system for the lookup to return a rack or AGV association.

visual_references.description: Container Selection screen showing tote lookup by location number and rack or AGV selection context.

steps.title: Open or view the Container Selection screen
steps.purpose: Access the screen used for location-based tote lookup.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Container Selection screen before entering the location number.
steps.expected_result: The Container Selection screen is visible and ready for lookup.
steps.healthy_condition: The Container Selection screen is displayed and the lookup area is available.
steps.failure_condition: The Container Selection screen is not available or cannot be viewed.

actions.label: Open Container Selection
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Container Selection screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Container Selection screen showing the location number entry field and rack or AGV selection area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.

source_evidence.text: Open or view the Container Selection screen. [Image support needed: Container Selection screen showing the location number entry field and rack or AGV selection area.]

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide frame showing the Container Selection screen for locating and selecting totes, racks, or AGVs in the system.

steps.title: Enter the location number
steps.purpose: Provide the lookup value used to find the tote location association.
steps.instruction: Type the location number into the screen input field.
steps.expected_result: The entered location number is accepted by the screen for lookup.
steps.healthy_condition: The location number appears in the input field.
steps.failure_condition: The location number cannot be entered or is not accepted in the field.

actions.label: Enter location number
actions.exact_action: Type the location number into the screen input field.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The location number entry area on the Container Selection screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the location number cannot be entered.

source_evidence.text: Type the location number into the screen input field.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in and selecting the rack or AGV it's located on if it's in the system.'

steps.title: Review the returned rack or AGV association
steps.purpose: Determine whether the entered location number maps to a tote location in the system.
steps.instruction: Review the displayed result to identify the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if it is in the system.
steps.expected_result: A rack or AGV association is visible for the entered location number when the tote is in the system.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the rack or AGV associated with the entered location number.
steps.failure_condition: No rack or AGV association is returned, or the tote is not shown as being in the system.

actions.label: Review lookup result
actions.exact_action: Review the displayed result to identify the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if it is in the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed rack or AGV result associated with the entered location number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the lookup does not return a rack or AGV association.
Stop or escalate if the tote is not in the system.

source_evidence.text: Review the displayed result to identify the rack or AGV where the tote is located, if it is in the system.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in and selecting the rack or AGV it's located on if it's in the system.'

source_evidence.text: If the tote is not in the system, this source does not provide further recovery steps.

steps.title: Select the shown rack or AGV
steps.purpose: Act on the returned lookup result to identify the associated location object.
steps.instruction: Select the shown rack or AGV associated with the entered location number.
steps.expected_result: The associated rack or AGV is selected.
steps.healthy_condition: The correct rack or AGV associated with the location number is selected.
steps.failure_condition: No selectable rack or AGV is shown, or the association is unclear.

actions.label: Select associated rack or AGV
actions.exact_action: Select the shown rack or AGV associated with the entered location number.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The rack or AGV item shown as the lookup result for the entered location number.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if no rack or AGV can be selected for the entered location number.
Stop or escalate if the displayed association is unclear.

source_evidence.text: Select the shown rack or AGV associated with the entered location number.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: OCR text: 'You can also find a tote by typing the location number in and selecting the rack or AGV it's located on if it's in the system.'

steps.title: Confirm the tote location association
steps.purpose: Use the displayed and selected association to confirm where the tote is located in the system.
steps.instruction: Use the displayed association to confirm the tote location.
steps.expected_result: The tote location is confirmed based on the displayed rack or AGV association.
steps.healthy_condition: The operator can identify the tote's associated rack or AGV from the lookup result.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed association does not allow the operator to confirm the tote location.

actions.label: Confirm tote location
actions.exact_action: Use the displayed association to confirm the tote location.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The selected rack or AGV association used to confirm the tote location.

stop_or_escalate_if: Stop or escalate if the tote location cannot be confirmed from the displayed association.

source_evidence.text: Use the displayed association to confirm the tote location.
The user can identify and select the rack or AGV associated with the entered location number when the tote is present in the system.

success_criteria: The location number is entered on the Container Selection screen.
A rack or AGV association is displayed for the tote when it is in the system.
The operator selects the shown rack or AGV.
The tote location is confirmed from the displayed association.
healthy_conditions: The Container Selection screen is available.
The location number can be entered.
The system displays a rack or AGV association for the entered location number when the tote is in the system.
The displayed association can be selected and used to confirm tote location.
failure_conditions: The Container Selection screen cannot be accessed.
The location number cannot be entered.
The lookup does not return a rack or AGV association.
The tote is not in the system.
The displayed association is unclear or cannot be selected.
escalation_guidance: Escalate or seek clarification if the location number lookup does not return a rack or AGV association.
If the tote is not in the system, this source does not provide further recovery steps.
